pi_items.source: Verified by inspecting setup_rocket_chat.sh which executes the seeding script with the target channel name "release-updates".
Verified by inspecting export_result.sh and verifier.py which query and evaluate messages specifically from the "general" channel.
Verified by inspecting verifier.py which strictly requires the exact substring "Latest release notes:" to award the programmatic score.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses real data from a GitHub API snapshot of Rocket.Chat releases to populate the environment. I confirmed via setup scripts that the release announcements are explicitly seeded into the "release-updates" channel. The evaluation script specifically retrieves messages from the "general" channel, and the verification logic strictly requires that the agent posts a message containing the phrase "Latest release notes:" along with a valid permalink to the newest release message.
